agent: ask
description: Run thesis session-start checklist and report gaps before work
---

Run the thesis session-start checklist now before any new work:

1. Read `00_admin/thesis_state.md` and confirm title/RQ/scope state.
2. Read `07_implementation/backlog.md` and summarize current item statuses.
3. Read `07_implementation/experiment_log.md` and confirm each `done` backlog item has an `EXP-XXX` entry.
4. Read `00_admin/change_log.md` and confirm highest `C-###` with no stubs.
5. Read `00_admin/decision_log.md` and confirm highest `D-###`.
6. Read `00_admin/unresolved_issues.md` and surface active blockers.
7. Report findings first, then list any fixes made.

Do not start implementation until this checklist is complete.
